description: An onSuccess arm fault tightens a settled outcome; the Gather's verdict is computed after the arms.

all-succeed.description: Baseline: every dispatch settles and arms successfully; the policy is met.

settled-failure-observed.description: A dispatch configured to fail at the mock is observed data; the policy is still met.

arm-fault-tightens-to-unmet.description: All dispatches settle successfully (policy met), but one arm faults, dropping the count below the policy.

arm-fault-survives.description: The same arm fault under a looser policy that still clears after tightening.

mixed-causes-unmet.description: A settled failure and an arm fault both count against the policy; the evidence tells the two causes apart.

order-under-delay.description: Descending per-dispatch delays scramble completion order; the output projection stays in dispatch order.
